NeuropathyText.html.en: NOTE: Polyneuropathy refers to the weakening of motor function due to neurological degeneration, particularly in the hind end. Symptoms can include hind-end weakness and incontinence. Younger dogs with idiopathic LP often don't suffer from LP-related polyneuropathy.
NeuropathyText.html._source: NOTE: Polyneuropathy refers to the weakening of motor function due to neurological degeneration, particularly in the hind end. Symptoms can include hind-end weakness and incontinence. Younger dogs with idiopathic LP often don't suffer from LP-related polyneuropathy.
